text: In a competitive anime trivia round, which fact correctly matches Motoko Kusanagi?
answers: a cyborg major investigating cybercrime and identity
a disciplined ronin traveling with Mugen and Fuu

a telepathic child in a fake family hiding real secrets
correctAnswer: a cyborg major investigating cybercrime and identity
